title: LEGO Speed Champions Time Machine from Back to the Future Toy - Car Model Kit w/Doc Brown & Marty McFly Minifigures - Gift for 9+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Movie Fans - 77256
availability_text: This item will be released on January 1, 2026.
features: BACK TO THE FUTURE CAR TOY – LEGO Speed Champions Time Machine from Back to the Future toy for 9+ year old boys and girls to build, display and recreate movie scenes
2 PLAY OPTIONS – The car model has a lightning hook from the first movie, or it can be rebuilt into flying mode with sideways wheels and Mr. Fusion from the second movie
2 LEGO MINIFIGURES – This Back to the Future toy comes with 2 characters from the movie franchise, Doc Brown and Marty McFly, to place inside the cockpit and enjoy role play
AUTHENTIC DETAILS – The building set features details from the movie version including rear air vents, a cockpit, the flux capacitor, time calculator and so much more
BACK TO THE FUTURE GIFT – This LEGO Back to the Future building toy provides a fun build-and-play experience and is a great birthday gift for 9+ year old boys, girls, movie fans and nostalgic adults
EXPAND THE RACING FUN – Discover more LEGO Speed Champions car model kits (sold separately) packed with authentic details for kids and passionate car enthusiasts
description: Product Description LEGO Speed Champions Time Machine from Back to the Future (77256) car toy for 9+ year old boys and girls lets fans build, display and recreate action from the iconic movie franchise. This brick-built car model includes many of the famous details from the one seen in the popular movies. Build this iconic toy car with a lightning rod and California number plate from the first movie before rebuilding it into its flying version from the second movie with Mr. Fusion, an orange number plate and sideways wheels. Both versions have rear air vents, a cockpit, the flux capacitor and time calculator. For added play value, the model kit also comes with 2 LEGO minifigure characters from the movies: Doc Brown and Marty McFly to place inside the cockpit. A great birthday gift for 9+ year old boys, girls and nostalgic adults, the building set can be built with confidence using the LEGO Builder app, which lets them zoom, rotate in 3D and track progress with easy-to-follow digital instructions. Set contains 357 pieces. Safety Warning Warning! Choking hazard. Small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years old.
